shared_facts: Sen. Lindsey Graham, a Republican from South Carolina, has died at age 71 following a sudden illness.
President Donald Trump spoke to Sen. Lindsey Graham via telephone before the senator's death.
Rep. Ro Khanna expressed regret regarding his previous support for Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner following allegations of sexual assault.
latest_clusters.synthesis: Sen. Lindsey Graham has died at age 71 after a sudden illness, prompting discussions regarding his legacy and the political process for his replacement in the Senate. President Donald Trump, who recently spoke with the senator, publicly praised Graham's past legislative actions. Simultaneously, Rep. Ro Khanna has withdrawn his support for Maine Democratic candidate Graham Platner following reports of sexual misconduct.
latest_clusters.confidence: HIGH. The primary factual assertions regarding the death of Sen. Lindsey Graham and the public statements made by Rep. Ro Khanna and President Donald Trump are consistent across the provided source reports.

shared_facts: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani has died at the age of 74.
Sheikh Hamad ruled Qatar from 1995 until he voluntarily transferred power to his son in 2013.
Funeral prayers for Sheikh Hamad were held at the Imam Muhammad ibn Abd al-Wahhab Mosque in Doha.
Sheikh Hamad is to be buried at Lusail Cemetery.
latest_clusters.synthesis: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, the former emir of Qatar who ruled from 1995 to 2013, has died at the age of 74. Following his death, funeral prayers were held for him at the Imam Muhammad ibn Abd al-Wahhab Mosque in Doha, attended by members of the ruling family and citizens. He was scheduled for burial at the Lusail Cemetery.
latest_clusters.confidence: HIGH. All provided articles are from a single news organization and present consistent, non-contradictory biographical and event-based information.

shared_facts: A bull bison attacked a man at the Bridge Bay Campground in Yellowstone National Park on Friday.
The man was seriously injured.
The incident was captured on video by a professional photographer named Mike MacLeod.
The attack occurred south of Fishing Bridge.
latest_clusters.synthesis: A tourist sustained serious injuries following an encounter with a bull bison at Yellowstone National Park's Bridge Bay campground on Friday. The event was recorded by photographer Mike MacLeod, who described the animal's aggressive behavior. The National Park Service has not yet released an official report regarding the incident.
